title: LuckyFishingRod
description: when you fish, you catch random items
body:
# RandomFishingRod
This magical fishing rod is an extraordinary tool for every angler!
Equipped with the unique ability to catch random items,
this rod makes every cast full of surprises. Instead of traditional fish,
you can catch everything from rare treasures to everyday items that might turn out to be unexpectedly useful.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hKDR3QRN/images/0f9364e069d008bc6b9d02494a7ad17589d10b16.png)
